rows.label: xs07070100_MSG0002
rows.name: Why do they hate Earthlings so much?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07070100_MSG0003
rows.name:
It's certain that something more
than simple hatred is driving them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07070100_MSG0004
rows.name:
Something like a threat
to their own survival.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07070100_MSG0005
rows.name:
It's not like we came out
into space by choice either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07070100_MSG0006
rows.name:
We lost Earth[ST:wide ]― and even after coming
all the way to a planet like this[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07070100_MSG0011
rows.name: Colonel Elma, we'll head back to NLA first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07070100_MSG0012
rows.name: Thank you for supporting the mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07070100_MSG0014
rows.name:
Iriina had a younger brother who
was also Gwin's best friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07070100_MSG0015
rows.name:
He couldn't get on the White
Whale. He shared Earth's fate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07070100_MSG0017
rows.name:
I don't want to dismiss it as a
common story[ST:wide ]― but that's reality.[ST:wait ]
